title: sports-registry — permissions
scope_suffix_convention: Every read permission is universal — the sport catalog is UI reference data that every tenant role reads (enrollment flows, roster forms, team creation, athlete profiles all need it). Writes are admin-owned. The `.tenant` suffix on writes is implicit (the observer refuses cross-tenant writes anyway).

permissions.name: sports.viewAny
permissions.description: Every tenant role reads the sports catalog — sports are UI reference data (every enrollment + roster + team form reads them).

permissions.name: sports.resolve
permissions.description: Read-only resolver endpoint for sport_key / discipline_key / position_key triples.

permissions.name: sports.create
permissions.description: Consumes 1 sports_registry_custom_slot entitlement. Enterprise-only via sports_registry_custom (Small + Medium refused with SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED).

permissions.name: sports.update
permissions.description: Mutable fields on tenant customs: name, description, color, icon, sort_order, age_range_min/max, governing_body, gender_typical. Slug + category + is_platform_seeded + tenant_id are immutable.

permissions.name: sports.deactivate
permissions.description: Flip is_active from true → false. Refused when active downstream references exist (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE).

permissions.name: sports.reactivate
permissions.description: Reverse of deactivate. Refused when the parent Sport is inactive (a reactivated Discipline can't hang off an inactive Sport).

permissions.name: sports.delete
permissions.description: Owner only — hard-delete on tenant customs only (platform rows are permanent). Refused when downstream references exist.

permissions.name: sports.manage
permissions.description: Umbrella permission for the settings blueprint gate.

permissions.name: platform.sports.viewAny
permissions.description: Cross-tenant catalog read for support tooling. All platform staff have read access.

permissions.name: platform.sports.create
permissions.description: Add new platform-level Sport rows. Product + super_admin only — new taxonomy needs product approval.

permissions.name: platform.sports.deactivate
permissions.description: Deactivate a platform Sport — hides it from every tenant. Historical references still resolve.

permissions.name: platform.sports.reseed
permissions.description: Re-run SportCatalogSeeder against the shipped data/platform-sports-catalog.json. Support-tooling — super_admin only because a reseed can add rows, deactivate obsolete rows, and shifts every downstream tenant's picker.
